name: SKU Description Refiner

data.dsp_query: SELECT sku, category, current_title, current_description, ingredients, net_weight, uom FROM public.sku_master WHERE last_updated < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' LIMIT 20

semantic.cypher: MATCH (s:Sku {sku: {sku_id}})-[:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(a:Attribute) RETURN s.sku, COLLECT(a.name) AS attributes
